findings.title: Race Condition: Completion Marker Written Before History Append
findings.description: Completion marker written at line 417, but history append at lines 402-414 can raise exception. If append fails, marker already written, creating inconsistent state.

evidence.code_excerpt: Step 6: append_history in try block, Step 7: _write_completion_marker after try block
evidence.proof: Completion marker at line 417 executes even if append_history at line 403 raises exception

impact.business_consequence: Marker indicates success but history failed, breaking idempotency and causing data loss

recommendation.action: Move completion marker write INSIDE try block after history append succeeds

findings.title: Missing Terminal ID Format Validation
findings.description: _get_default_terminal_id() returns env var value without validation. Used in path construction allowing path injection.

evidence.proof: Returns env var directly without sanitization, used in paths at lines 238 and 1222

impact.business_consequence: Path injection vulnerability allows arbitrary directory writes

recommendation.action: Add terminal ID validation to reject dangerous characters

findings.title: Orphaned .tmp File Cleanup Missing
findings.description: tempfile.mkstemp() creates .tmp files but no cleanup call before writing. Process crashes leave orphaned files.

impact.business_consequence: Orphaned .tmp files accumulate wasting disk space

findings.title: Missing Completion Marker Schema Validation
findings.description: _check_completion_marker() reads JSON but doesn't validate schema. Missing fields cause KeyErrors.

evidence.code_excerpt: with open(completion_path) as f: marker = json.load(f)
evidence.proof: Returns marker dict without validating required fields

impact.business_consequence: Malformed markers cause runtime errors and crashes

recommendation.action: Add schema validation before using marker
recommendation.code_fix: Add _validate_completion_marker method with required field checks

findings.title: Incomplete Error Handling in _get_git_sha()
findings.description: Broad except clause returns None for all errors without logging. Cannot distinguish failure modes.

evidence.proof: All exceptions return None with no logging

recommendation.action: Add specific logging for different failure modes
recommendation.code_fix: Add separate except clauses with logging

findings.title: Missing Test for Concurrent Writes
findings.description: Test suite has 9 tests but none for concurrent access scenarios.

evidence.proof: No tests for concurrent writes or cross-terminal isolation

impact.business_consequence: Concurrent write bugs not caught by tests

recommendation.action: Add concurrent write tests using threading

overall_assessment: HIGH severity race condition (QUAL-001) where marker written before history append. MEDIUM issues: missing terminal ID validation (QUAL-002), missing schema validation (QUAL-004), poor error handling (QUAL-005). LOW issues: orphaned .tmp files (QUAL-003), missing concurrent tests (QUAL-006). Code follows good patterns but has gaps in validation and error handling.
